results.title: Houdini Python Modules
results.description: This documentation provides a comprehensive overview of various Python modules and packages designed for extending and interacting with Houdini, covering tools for rigging, animation, nodes, UI, and more.

results.title: Zabob-Houdini
results.description: A Python API that provides a clean, Pythonic interface for building Houdini node networks programmatically with declarative syntax and automatic context management.
